category_sources: Official README says TNEF unpacks application/ms-tnef attachments from Microsoft Outlook/Exchange mail.
source_facts.description says it is a Microsoft MS-TNEF attachment unpacker.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface and points users to the man page and --help for options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/verdammelt/tnef, so repo is intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README describes Microsoft Outlook/Exchange encapsulated attachments and application/ms-tnef handling.
